title: Advancement Counter
description: Counts your completed Advancements (modded too!) and displays the total amount on the player list. Single and Multiplayer.
body:
**👀What it is:**

- This mod has one simple feature. It displays the number of completed advancements next to your name in the player list (pressing tab).
- Custom Advancements from other mods work too.
- It works in Single and Multiplayer.

**❤️Support Me:**\
(This helps me putting more time into my projects, thanks in advance)\
